## [36:15 - 37:22]

So what if you got a lot of different offers? My suggestion is A, start with the one that's always worked the best in the past, and if you don't have any data from past promotions, start with your most expensive offer, and the reason I say that is because it's just as hard to sell cheap stuff as it is expensive stuff. So if you're selling expensive stuff, webinar to phone call, super simple. Application to phone call, super simple. Or if you're like a local business, hey, click here and call the office, right? So a lot of different options for sales processes.
